issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly address error handling or edge cases for missing user context.
The skill references a .claude-specific file, limiting applicability to Claude agents.

scenarios.name: Cart-abandonment exit-intent popup for DTC store
scenarios.rationale: Treatment specified exit-intent trigger excluding checkout, once-per-session with 14-30 day dismissal suppression, value-focused first-person CTA, polite decline copy, and a mobile bottom-slide-up variant per the skill's framework; baseline gave a generic discount popup with no frequency rules or mobile alternative.

scenarios.name: Blog newsletter signup popup without hurting reading UX
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used scroll-depth trigger (25-50%) restricted to blog pages, slide-in format that doesn't block content, single email field, social-proof headline, and dismissal suppression as the skill prescribes; baseline proposed a centered modal at page load with no frequency capping or content-context targeting.
